titleStmt.title: SII 38.443: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 443. (A.R. No. 443 of 1912.) KŌṬṬŪR, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south base, central shrine, Kōḻundēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravartin Rājarājadēva III Year 17: 1233 A.D.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records that Arivāyamuḻān Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ Marudiṟpirān of Chēyyanūr in Pāṇḍaiyūr-nāḍu (a sub division) of Irājarājavaḷanāḍu made a gift of 60 kāśu inorder to burn a perpetual lamp to (the deity) uḍaiyār Śīmulattānam-uḍaiyār at Kōṭṭūr in Neṉmali-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Rājēndrachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu. The Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple, received the above gift and agreed to measure out ghee as interest at the rate of one āḻakku per month.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 patineḻāvatu Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmali nāṭṭuk koṭṭur Uṭaiyār cimulattāṉamuṭaiyār ko
vil nāṭāna Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭu pāṇṭaiyūrnāṭṭuc cellūr Arivāyamuḻān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ marutiṟpirān pakkal nāṅkaḷ Ivarkkākaccantirātittavaṟ tirunuṉtāviḷakku Erikkak kaṭavomāka
civappirāmaṇar kāśyapaṉ tillaikkūttaṉ muṭikoṇṭānāṉa vañni paṭṭa(ne)ṉum gevutaman Eḻunvanṉiyāna vātcurapaṭṭaneṉum kāśyapan taruṇentiracekaran cuntarapaṭṭannanum kāścapan taraṇentu cekaran karicurapaṭṭaṉum
kaṇṭapaṭṭaneṉum pirātu vāran muṭikoṇṭānpaṭṭaneṉum kavucikan tirumulaṭṭāṉam Uyyavantāṉāna caṇṭecurapaṭṭaneṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom Ivaṉpakkal tirunuṉtāvi
[ḷak*kiṉuk]ku nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu Aṟupatu Ikkācu Aṟupatukkuk kācu Oṉṟukkut tiṅkaḷ policai Āḻākkeṇṇaiyāka vanta Eṇṇaikku Eṅkaḷ nāḷopātiyāl vanta kācu nerākak kaiyaka koṇṭu Ittirunuṉtā vi
Digital edition of SII 38.443 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
